blended.narrative: Mount St. Louis Moonstone is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 7 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: light rain showers, highs of 51°F.
Wednesday: 4" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect variable conditions.
